cases.description: Smallest value in a simple numeric range
Negative numbers are correctly ordered below positives
Text values in the range are ignored, not treated as 0
cases.expected_note: MIN skips non-numeric text cells entirely rather than erroring or treating them as 0

cases.description: A range with no numeric values at all returns 0
cases.expected_note: MIN of an empty/all-blank range is documented to return 0
